case_title: INVESTMENT RETRIEVERS, INC. VS. KEK LIM et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF INVESTMENT RETRIEVERS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LIM, KEK DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-03-2009

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF INVESTMENT RETRIEVERS, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIM, KEK $9,919.33 PRINCIPAL, $1,325.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $3,312.96 INTEREST, $265.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $14,822.29, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
AMENDED SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF INVESTMENT RETRIEVERS, INC. SERVED FEB-23-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LIM, KEK
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $265.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT LIM, KEK
DECLARATION LAJUAN E. WOOD FILED RE: WAIVING EXCESS ATTORNEY'S FEES PRAYED FOR IN THE COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF INVESTMENT RETRIEVERS, INC.
DECLARATION JEFFREY FLETTERICK FILED RE: CCP 585 & CCP 1033 FILED BY PLAINTIFF INVESTMENT RETRIEVERS, INC.
